safety_use_cases.label: Automated safety actions and insights for incident follow-up

safety_use_cases.label: Driver exoneration using video evidence after a crash
safety_use_cases.description: Use in-vehicle video to exonerate drivers at the scene of a collision and confirm fault lies with the other party.

evidence.quote: They called us and they're like, hey, we need to get some vintage.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Merritt

evidence.quote: We're so happy that we have Beacon Ridge Telematics. They was actually able to exonerate their driver right on the scene.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Merritt

evidence.quote: It had nothing to do with the driver. was the other driver that had a head-on collision with them.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Merritt
